privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the standard HEC-RAS Muncie example dataset. A correct analysis yields a true maximum stream power of ~28400.38 at river station 14039.64, with a peak flow downstream of ~20998.47 cfs at index 242. However, the task's ground truth generation script (gen_gt.py inside export_result.sh) contains a critical bug: it attempts to read 'Geometry/Cross Sections/River Stations' from the HDF file, which does not exist in the HEC-RAS 6.6 HDF schema (stations are instead stored in 'Geometry/Cross Sections/Attributes'). This bug causes the evaluator to unconditionally fail with 'Could not find stations', making the task structurally unpassable regardless of agent performance.
